# Documentation Example

The following block demonstrates the AaC+DaC convention syntax.
It is shown inside a fenced code block for documentation purposes
and must NOT be treated as a real fence region by the validator.

```markdown
<!-- aac:generated source=docs/diagrams/system.c4 view=L1 -->
Diagram content would appear here.
<!-- aac:end -->
```

Outside the code block, a real authored region:

<!-- aac:authored owner=alice -->
This is real authored content outside any code block.
<!-- aac:end -->
